title: Battery / BMS Registration and Reset
description: Register new battery specifications with the Battery Management System (BMS) and reset charge strategy after battery replacement.
common_symptoms: battery not charging correctly after replacement
physical_solution: Inform the BMS of the new battery type, capacity, and age so the charging system recalibrates. Without this step the ECU may use incorrect charge profiles.

technical_solution.elm327_feasibility: Partial — $2E write accessible on many platforms. OEM-specific DID for battery capacity/type required. BMW most documented.
preconditions: Battery type and Ah rating known

procedure_steps.description: Record new battery: type (AGM/EFB/flooded), cold cranking amps, and Ah rating from label.
Enter BMS/IBS/power management ECU extended session: $10 03
Write battery registration data: $2E [BATTERY_REG_DID] [TYPE_BYTE] [AH_BYTE]. Or execute registration routine: $31 01 [REG_ROUTINE_ID]
Read back registration via $22 [BATTERY_DID] to confirm values accepted.
Start vehicle. Let idle for 10 minutes. Confirm voltage and charging current normalize.

oem_notes.BMW/MINI: IBS (Intelligent Battery Sensor) registration critical. Every battery swap requires this. AGM vs flooded distinction matters. ISTA codes the registration — ELM327 with correct DID works on E/F-series.
oem_notes.Ford: BMS reset common on EcoBoost platforms. IDS/FDRS registration path. DID varies by platform.
oem_notes.GM: Battery sensor reset on Buick/Cadillac/Chevy with EFB/AGM. GDS2 path or adaptation write.
oem_notes.VW/Audi: Battery adaptation in BCM/energy management. VCDS adaptation channel path well documented.
oem_notes.Stellantis: Body module battery adaptation. SGW may block on 2018+. Pre-2018 straightforward.
oem_notes.Hyundai/Kia: BMS reset via GDS on newer models with ISG/mild hybrid. Standard battery swap usually doesn't need reset on older models.
oem_notes.Honda/Acura: IMA on hybrid systems requires registration. Standard ICE models: less critical but available.
oem_notes.Nissan/Infiniti: Battery adaptation on ECO/Stop-Start equipped models. CONSULT III+ path.
